vocab.meaning: chiêm ngưỡng, thưởng ngoạn cảnh đẹp
vocab.example: I spent the entire afternoon on the balcony just taking in the panoramic view of the Swiss Alps.

vocab.meaning: mở rộng ra (về phía tầm mắt, không gian)
vocab.example: As we reached the top of the hill, the narrow path opened out into a breathtaking valley filled with wildflowers.

vocab.meaning: che khuất hoàn toàn (tầm nhìn, ánh sáng)
vocab.example: The massive red sand dunes of the Namib Desert were so tall that they seemed to blot out the horizon.

vocab.meaning: tận hưởng một cách say sưa (vẻ đẹp hoặc không khí)
vocab.example: Standing on the edge of the Grand Canyon, I just stood there drinking in the sheer scale of the landscape.

vocab.meaning: bừng sáng, chiếu sáng rực rỡ
vocab.example: The golden hour began to light up the ancient temples of Bagan, turning the whole plain into a glowing masterpiece.

vocab.meaning: tình cờ bắt gặp (một cảnh đẹp không định trước)
vocab.example: While wandering through the backstreets of Kyoto, we stumbled across a hidden garden that was exquisitely tranquil.

vocab.meaning: cao sừng sững, áp đảo phía trên
vocab.example: The jagged peaks of the Himalayas tower over the surrounding clouds, creating a truly humbling sight.

vocab.meaning: hòa quyện, tan vào (môi trường xung quanh)
vocab.example: The modern architecture of the museum seemed to blend into the natural cliffs, making it look like a part of the earth.

vocab.meaning: tan biến đi (thường là sương mù hoặc cảm giác mệt mỏi khi thấy cảnh đẹp)
vocab.example: Watching the early morning mist melt away to reveal the crystal-clear lake was the highlight of my trip to Canada.

vocab.meaning: đột ngột hiện ra rực rỡ (thường là màu sắc)
vocab.example: At sunset, the sky suddenly burst into shades of violet and crimson, reflecting perfectly on the salt flats.
